name: Zoho CRM
positioning: Default Indian SMB CRM; recognised brand; huge feature surface; breaks at rep adoption and behaviour-level tracking.
strengths: 60+ Zoho Suite integrations (Books, Desk, Projects, Campaigns)
Deep customisation via Deluge + custom modules
weaknesses: Rep adoption collapses at UI layer (logging = 4–6 clicks)
WhatsApp treated as integration, not native channel
Basic rule-based scoring, no decay, no three-dimensional breakdown
switchingNarrative: Run Leadkaun alongside Zoho for 60 days — Leadkaun for grading/queue/₹-at-risk; Zoho for long-tail customisation. Consolidate once ROI is proven.

name: LeadSquared
positioning: India-built CRM strong in EdTech + BFSI + healthcare; still activity-focused, not behaviour-focused.
strengths: Born in India; knows the market
weaknesses: No rupee-first metrics (counts, not ₹ at risk)
switchingNarrative: Keep LeadSquared for workflow customisation + mobile field app. Add Leadkaun for the behaviour layer LeadSquared was never designed for.

name: HubSpot
positioning: Freemium marketing-funnel champion; USD-billed; marketing-first bias; overbuilt for Indian SMB sales.
strengths: Strong content + blog + landing page builder
weaknesses: USD pricing — Professional tier is 2× Leadkaun Growth for Indian teams
No lakhs/crores UI; no native WhatsApp tracking
Complex at Professional/Enterprise tiers (2–6 weeks onboarding)
Per-contact pricing scales badly with 50k+ cold leads
switchingNarrative: HubSpot for marketing automation (even Free tier is useful). Leadkaun for the sales-behaviour layer. Combined cost often under HubSpot Professional alone.

name: Salesforce
positioning: Enterprise-grade CRM standard; rational at 200+ reps; overkill for Indian B2B SMBs.
weaknesses: India localisation partial — US-first product feel
Notoriously low rep adoption in mid-market India
switchingNarrative: Salesforce earns its keep at 200+ reps. Below that, Leadkaun (or Zoho/LeadSquared for workflow CRM) is the pragmatic path. Migration is 2–4 weeks for SMBs.

name: Freshsales
positioning: Freshworks' sales CRM; clean UI; 'Freddy AI' scoring is a black box; India-origin brand but globally calibrated.
strengths: Clean, modern UI (best in class for CRM UX)
weaknesses: Freddy AI scoring is opaque — no three-dimensional breakdown
WhatsApp via Freshchat add-on, not native
switchingNarrative: Keep Freshchat/Freshdesk for support if you use them. Add Leadkaun for the behaviour layer Freshsales leaves out.
